rows.label: qev013201_MSG0001
rows.name: ...Hmm? What's this, another enlistment hopeful?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Our team isn't for those without guts, you know? 
Even among the daredevils of the Pathfinder Union, 
we're the most reckless bunch of them all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0010
rows.name: Assert

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0011
rows.name: Assure him that you have the guts.

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0020
rows.name: Correct

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0021
rows.name: Explain to him that you didn't come to join up.

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Heh, so you say. 
...Though, I'll admit there's a fire in your eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0004
rows.name:
...No? Huh. 
Must be the outfit that threw me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Wait a sec... 
You're [ST:playername ], right? 
From Elma's team?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0030
rows.name: Nod

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0031
rows.name: Confirm his suspicion.

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0040
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask how he knows your name.

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Aha! Thought so! 
I've heard all the stories![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0007
rows.name:
Word is you've been racking up glory 
left and right with Elma's squad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0008
rows.name:
A bunch of BLADEs in my line have been talking about 
this crazy new rookie who joined up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Heh! I've been wanting to meet you! 
Name's Corondas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0010
rows.name:
I lead Corondas's team. 
Nice to meet you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0050
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask about Corondas's team.

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0060
rows.name: Greet

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0061
rows.name: Exchange friendly greetings.

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Curious about other teams, are you? 
You're a quick study![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0013
rows.name:
Let's see... This crazy rock we landed on is full of 
weird new threats and mysteries we've never seen before, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0014
rows.name:
The mission of the Pathfinders is to crush those threats, 
crack those mysteries, and chart this world to the very edge...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0015
rows.name:
And for some reason, my team's full of folks with more 
childlike curiosity for the unknown than sense![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Heeeey, look who's got manners! 
Heh. You and me are gonna get along just fine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Though depending on the situation, 
we might end up competing for jobs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0018
rows.name: So we can't just be purely friends, you get it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Huh? Captain, who's that? 
A new recruit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0020
rows.name:
I wish we could get someone like this to join up. 
You've heard the name [ST:playername ] before, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0021
rows.name: Sure, the one who joined Elma-san's team...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Wait! 
Is this the rumored rookie!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Sure is! 
A skilled BLADE, completely different from a greenhorn like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0024
rows.name:
Rrrgh... But the stories could just be exaggerated. 
How do we know if [ST:gender p1=he p2=she ]'s actually got real skill?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0025
rows.name:
In the end, isn't it just Elma-san who's excellent, 
and this one is just riding her coattails?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0070
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0071
rows.name: Don't take offense.

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0080
rows.name: Challenge

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0081
rows.name: Take great offense.

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0026
rows.name: Hah! And humble, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0027
rows.name: You don't have to hold back for this idiot, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0028
rows.name:
Might as well break it to him straight. 
You're totally out of his league!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Rrrgh... I feel like I'm dancing to the Captain's tune... 
But no! I can't take this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Not gonna take the insult sitting down, huh? 
At least your pride is fully grown.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0031
rows.name:
...Then let's see this supposed skill of yours. 
Let me test if the rumors are true![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0032
rows.name:
I just took on a survey request to find 
the Ensanguined Font in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0033
rows.name:
What do you say we race to see who finds it first... 
Put our pride as BLADEs on the line and compete?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0034
rows.name:
Heh... Bates is really fired up about this. 
Sorry for the trouble, but I'm asking you to do it too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0035
rows.name:
If this greenhorn is going to shed his shell, 
he needs a rival like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0036
rows.name:
Plus... I think a little contest like this 
will help you grow as well, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0037
rows.name:
Heh! That's what I like to hear! 
Then I'll head out right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0038
rows.name:
I don't know what you've done until now, 
but I'm your senior in this industry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0039
rows.name:
I'm definitely not losing! 
I'll show you the true power of Corondas's team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0040
rows.name:
Hah, this turned into a weird situation, 
but thanks for lighting a fire in his heart![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0041
rows.name:
Well, it's not bad for BLADEs to push each other 
like this every now and then, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0090
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0091
rows.name: Tell Corondas that you could do with a fresh challenge.

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0100
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0101
rows.name: Warn Corondas that such competitiveness isn't productive.

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0042
rows.name:
Heh, you really get it. 
You ooze the feeling of a battle-hardened veteran.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0043
rows.name:
Competing fiercely with rivals, reflecting on yourself, 
and aiming higher... That kind of thing is necessary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0044
rows.name:
Yeah... The reason I was able to jump out into the unknown 
was because I refused to lose to all those great explorers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0045
rows.name:
What, are you a pacifist? 
But you know, there are areas where that won't fly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0046
rows.name:
A BLADE's job requires crossing the line. 
Playing nice will only get you so far before you hit a wall.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0047
rows.name:
I'm sure there are many ways to do things in this world, 
but that's how I see it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0048
rows.name:
...Alright, time to depart with that frontier spirit in our chests! 
Let's strip off the mysteries of Planet Mira with our own hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0049
rows.name:
So? 
Did you decide to accept Bates's challenge?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0050
rows.name:
Come on, it's fine, right? I think a little contest like this 
will help you grow as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0051
rows.name:
Heh! That's what I like to hear! 
Then I'll head out right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0052
rows.name:
I don't know what you've done until now, 
but I'm your senior in this industry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0053
rows.name:
I'm definitely not losing! 
I'll show you the true power of Corondas's team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0055
rows.name:
Well... anyway. 
Thanks for lighting a fire in his heart![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0110
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0111
rows.name: Tell Corondas that fresh challenges are always welcome.

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0120
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0121
rows.name: Warn Corondas that such competitiveness isn't productive.

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0056
rows.name:
Heh, you really get it. 
You ooze the feeling of a battle-hardened veteran.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0057
rows.name:
Competing fiercely with rivals, reflecting on yourself, 
and aiming higher... That kind of thing is necessary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0058
rows.name:
Yeah... The reason I was able to jump out into the unknown 
was because I refused to lose to all those great explorers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0059
rows.name:
What, are you a pacifist? 
But you know, there are areas where that won't fly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0060
rows.name:
A BLADE's job requires crossing the line. 
Playing nice will only get you so far before you hit a wall.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0061
rows.name:
I'm sure there are many ways to do things in this world, 
but that's how I see it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0062
rows.name:
...Alright, time to depart with that frontier spirit in our chests! 
Let's strip off the mysteries of Planet Mira with our own hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0063
rows.name:
He might be a greenhorn, 
but he's a BLADE I personally trained hard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0110
rows.name:
If you mess around, that bastard Bates 
will beat you to the punch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0064
rows.name:
Alright! Set out into the unknown 
and aim for the Ensanguined Font![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0065
rows.name:
Oh! You made it back safely! 
You didn't get attacked by any weird guys out there, did you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0130
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0131
rows.name: Tell Corondas everything was fine.

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0140
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0141
rows.name: Ask Corondas why he is concerned.

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0066
rows.name: I see... That's good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0068
rows.name:
It seems Bates got attacked by some strange Pawn Verdes 
led by a black Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0069
rows.name:
His Doll got wrecked, and we even lost contact with him. 
Be careful if you're exploring that area too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0070
rows.name:
We're going to rescue him right away. 
Heh... I don't know who these punks are, 
but I'll make them regret it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0150
rows.name: Assist

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0151
rows.name: Offer to help out.

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0160
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0161
rows.name: Wish them good luck.

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0071
rows.name:
Alright! 
Well, let's grab a drink together once things settle down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0072
rows.name:
...Oh right, here's your reward for this time. 
It's not much, but please accept it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0073
rows.name:
Captain! We're ready! 
We can depart immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0074
rows.name:
Alright! Let's go then! 
We're definitely going to rescue that greenhorn![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0075
rows.name: ...Tch! What a softy you are![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0076
rows.name:
We don't even know what kind of demons or snakes 
are waiting for us out there, you understand?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0077
rows.name:
But you're still willing to lend a hand? 
For that greenhorn... for our comrade.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0079
rows.name:
...I see. Thank you! 
I'll rely on those feelings of yours![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0080
rows.name:
Bates sent his last distress signal 
from Everwhelm Falls in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0081
rows.name:
We'll track his movements from our end too... 
We have to save that greenhorn's life no matter what![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0082
rows.name:
When it comes to Doll piloting skills, 
Bates has enough not to lose to just anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0083
rows.name: And yet he was taken down so easily...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0084
rows.name:
Tch... Anyway, we're dealing with an unknown enemy. 
Please be careful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0085
rows.name:
Thanks a lot! 
I heard the details from Bates.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0086
rows.name:
Heh! That bastard was completely terrified 
of that black Doll thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0087
rows.name:
So I gave him a good solid punch 
to knock some spirit back into him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0170
rows.name: Sympathize

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0171
rows.name: Show concern for poor Bates.

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0180
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0181
rows.name: Tell Corondas that Bates got what he deserved.

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0088
rows.name:
Hah! Aren't you sweet! 
But Corondas's team has a different style.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0089
rows.name:
If a guy can't stand, we punch him until he does! 
That's our way of doing things![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0090
rows.name:
Oh, you get it. 
Is that how Elma's team rolls too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0091
rows.name:
...Well, anyway, you really saved us! 
Here's your reward, take it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0092
rows.name:
...Right. 
You ran into that black Doll too, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0093
rows.name:
Tell it to me straight. 
Did the enemy gunning for us seem strong?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0190
rows.name: Warn

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0191
rows.name: Express your concerns about the threat it poses.

rows.label: qev013201_JNK0200
rows.name: Dismiss

rows.label: qev013201_SEL0201
rows.name: Tell Corondas it's nothing to worry about.

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0094
rows.name:
If you say so, it must be pretty serious. 
It seems they're targeting BLADEs specifically.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0095
rows.name:
It might be best to tell the team members to stay alert... 
I'll go let Larry know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0096
rows.name:
...Yeah. 
Well, let's both be careful out there on the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0097
rows.name:
Heh! Reliable as always! 
A far cry from a coward like Bates![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0098
rows.name:
Still, they seem to be targeting BLADEs, 
so I guess I should at least tell Larry to stay alert.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013201_MSG0099
rows.name:
We're not scared of guys like that, 
but let's both be careful out there on the job.[ST:wait ]
